message:
fix: seq gap on write failure, report corrupt lines, single-handle TOCTOU

Three targeted fixes in transcript.go:

1. Move w.seq++ after successful write+sync so a failed write doesn't
   create a sequence gap on the next successful append.

2. Change ReadTranscript return signature to (header, entries, skipped, err)
   so callers can detect and report corrupt/partial lines from crash
   recovery instead of silently ignoring them.

3. Eliminate TOCTOU race in OpenTranscriptWriter by using a single
   os.File handle (O_RDWR) for the read-truncate-seek sequence
   instead of separate ReadFile/Truncate/OpenFile calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
